---
title: '@haneullabs/haneulns'
---

This package now exports a client extension that integrates with Haneul clients.

```diff
- import { SuiClient, getFullnodeUrl } from '@haneullabs/haneul/client';
- import { SuinsClient } from '@haneullabs/haneulns';
+ import { SuiGrpcClient } from '@haneullabs/haneul/grpc'; // or SuiJsonRpcClient, SuiGraphQLClient
+ import { haneulns } from '@haneullabs/haneulns';

- const suiClient = new SuiClient({ url: getFullnodeUrl('mainnet') });
- const haneulnsClient = new SuinsClient({
-   client: suiClient,
-   network: 'mainnet',
- });
+ const client = new SuiGrpcClient({
+   baseUrl: 'https://fullnode.mainnet.haneul.io:443',
+   network: 'mainnet',
+ }).$extend(haneulns());

- const nameRecord = await haneulnsClient.getNameRecord('example.haneul');
+ const nameRecord = await client.haneulns.getNameRecord('example.haneul');
```

## Custom Package IDs

For custom deployments or networks other than mainnet/testnet, you can provide custom package info:

```ts
import { SuiGrpcClient } from '@haneullabs/haneul/grpc';
import { haneulns, type PackageInfo } from '@haneullabs/haneulns';

const customPackageInfo: PackageInfo = {
	packageId: '0x...',
	packageIdV1: '0x...',
	// ... other required fields
};

const client = new SuiGrpcClient({
	baseUrl: 'http://localhost:9000',
	network: 'localnet',
}).$extend(haneulns({ packageInfo: customPackageInfo }));
```
